news_items.headline: Alex Freeland homers twice, Ryder Ryan returns for Oklahoma City
news_items.summary: All four Dodgers minor league affiliates won on Saturday. Player of the day Alex Freeland homered for a second straight day, and liked it so much he did it twice on Saturday. After Friday’s homer was hit from the right side, Freeland on Saturday homered twice while batting left-handed, and also singled. Freeland scored three […]
